# st-alicloud_aliadb_dw_scaling_plan (Resource)

Manages an Elastic Scaling Plan for an existing Alicloud AnalyticDB for MySQL (ADB) data warehouse edition cluster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "st-alicloud_aliadb_dw_scaling_plan" "monthly_plan" {
  db_cluster_id               = "am-bp1xxxxxxxx"
  elastic_plan_name           = "adb_scale_plan"
  elastic_plan_time_start     = "01:00:00"
  elastic_plan_time_end       = "05:00:00"
  elastic_plan_type           = "executor"
  elastic_plan_start_day      = "2026-07-01"
  elastic_plan_end_day        = "2027-07-01"
  elastic_plan_enable         = true
  elastic_plan_node_num       = 5
  elastic_plan_monthly_repeat = "28,29,30,31"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `db_cluster_id` (String)
- `elastic_plan_enable` (Boolean)
- `elastic_plan_name` (String)
- `elastic_plan_time_end` (String)
- `elastic_plan_time_start` (String)
- `elastic_plan_type` (String)

### Optional

- `elastic_plan_end_day` (String)
- `elastic_plan_monthly_repeat` (String)
- `elastic_plan_node_num` (Number)
- `elastic_plan_start_day` (String)
- `elastic_plan_weekly_repeat` (String)
- `elastic_plan_worker_spec` (String)
- `resource_pool_name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

AnalyticDB scaling plans can be imported using the db_cluster_id, and the elastic_plan_name, e.g.

```terraform
terraform import 'st-alicloud_aliadb_dw_scaling_plan.scaling_plan' '<db_cluster_id>:elastic_plan_name'
```
